nasb.text: Then they set out from Mount Hor by the way of the Red Sea, to go around the land of Edom; and the people became impatient because of the journey.

esv.text: From Mount Hor they set out by the way to the Red Sea, to go around the land of Edom. And the people became impatient on the way.

cnv.text: 他們從何珥山沿著到紅海的路起行，要繞過以東地；眾民因為這條路，心裡煩躁，

ccb.text: 以色列人为了绕过以东，便从何珥山出发，沿通往红海的路行进。途中，民众心里烦躁，
